_comment: The single configuration file. Copy to config.json and edit. Bootstrap values (port, paths, admin password) are read on every start; seed data (upstream, models, gatewayApiKeys) is synced into the SQLite database whenever this file changes. Runtime state can also be managed live from the admin dashboard.
_webDistDir_comment: Where the built frontend lives. Defaults to ./web/dist (set by the build). Override only if you relocated it.
_adminPassword_comment: Admin dashboard password. If null, a random one-time password is generated and printed to the console on first boot. Changeable later from the dashboard Settings page.
_corsOrigin_comment: Allow this origin for /api in dev (e.g. http://localhost:5173). Null in production (frontend served same-origin).
_seed_comment: Everything below is OPTIONAL seed data synced into the database when this file changes. Models/keys created in the dashboard are never touched by the sync.
_webTools_comment: Back Anthropic's hosted web_search/web_fetch tools with a pluggable web provider so they work against any upstream model. enabled=turn on; provider=backend id (currently 'firecrawl'); baseUrl blank = provider default; apiKey blank = keyless where supported (Firecrawl's public API rejects some IPs without a key — get a free one at firecrawl.dev).
